notes: Run 125: Task 5 (Proof Assistance) — SecondOrderReferenceModel.lean: 7 theorems (reset, update formulas, equilibrium fixed point, zero-rate state). Task 2 (Informal Spec) — notchfilter_informal.md written. Merged run124 PR (CRITIQUE+RESEARCH+TARGETS for targets 51-54). 48 files, 696 theorems, 0 sorry.

LowPassFilter2p.notes: Direct Form II biquad IIR Butterworth filter. 13 theorems. Correspondence test harness NOT YET written.

BlockIntegralTrap.notes: Trapezoidal integrator with symmetric saturation. 16 theorems. Correspondence test harness NOT YET written.

SecondOrderReferenceModel.notes: Run 125. Forward-Euler discretization. 7 theorems: reset postconditions (rfl), update formulas (rfl), equilibrium fixed point (proved via Rat arithmetic), zero-rate-at-target. PR: run125-sorm-notchfilter-informal.

NotchFilter.notes: Run 125: informal spec written. Direct Form I IIR notch filter applyInternal(). Passthrough, zero-state, linearity, delay update, reset. Open: DC gain invariant, stability guarantee, symmetric numerator in setCoefficients. Ready for Task 3 (Lean spec).

WelfordMeanVector.notes: Target 53. Vector WelfordMean. Extends WelfordMean.lean. 2-component model. mean = sum/count invariant.

PurePursuit.notes: Target 54. Lookahead distance = constrain(v*k, min, max). One theorem: lookahead_in_range via constrain_range. Safety-critical.
